description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13) across ubuntu-latest and windows-latest environments. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version allowing pre-releases, install pytest, numpy, and pandas using pip, and then run pytest with verbose output and doctest modules, ignoring a specific benchmark file.
